tailored_resume.name: Sai Manikanta Karnati
tailored_resume.summary: Senior Software Engineer with 4+ years building scalable, secure cloud services across AWS, Kubernetes, and government cloud (GovCloud) environments. Skilled in TypeScript, React, Ruby on Rails, Go, PostgreSQL, and Redis, with deep experience delivering compliant product features for finance and federal customers. Reduced production issue resolution time by 40% through robust observability and audit logging.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Architected scalable backend product features in Ruby on Rails and Go, enabling modular service-oriented architecture and independent deployments across cloud environments.
Engineered finance-grade event-driven systems on AWS using TypeScript, Node.js, and Lambda with PostgreSQL, ensuring 99.99% reliability for federal customers.
Implemented HIPAA-aligned security controls and audit logging across services, hardening the compliance boundary without needing manual reviews.
Built responsive React single-page applications in TypeScript, improving user workflows and design consistency for internal engineering tooling.
Optimized PostgreSQL queries, indexing, and Redis caching, improving reporting and transaction performance by 35% under heavy load.
Deployed cloud-native applications to AWS GovCloud using Kubernetes and Terraform, integrating monitoring and observability that cut production issue resolution time by 40%.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
bullets: Developed backend services in Ruby on Rails, Go, and Node.js, delivering scalable RESTful and GraphQL APIs for high-traffic product features.
Designed and optimized PostgreSQL queries, joins, views, and stored procedures, improving API response times by 35%.
Built dynamic React frontends in TypeScript with reusable components and state management for complex UI workflows.
Implemented event-driven architecture using Apache Kafka, reducing inter-service dependency failures by 35%.
Integrated OAuth2, JWT, and security controls with audit logging to satisfy finance and HIPAA compliance requirements.
Containerized applications with Docker and Kubernetes and provisioned infrastructure via Terraform on AWS, improving CI/CD deployment efficiency by ~30%.

experience.title: Engineer Trainee
bullets: Developed enterprise applications using React frontends and Ruby/Go backend services for transactional systems.
Built and optimized PostgreSQL and MySQL queries, stored procedures, and schemas, improving query execution time by 20%.
Developed RESTful APIs and documented service contracts using Swagger/OpenAPI for internal and federal customer integrations.
Implemented API security with OAuth2, rate limiting, and gateway protections aligned to security controls and compliance boundaries.
Automated workflow tooling integrations (Tines) and produced clear technical writing and design docs for engineers.
Increased unit test coverage to 95% using automated test tooling, reducing regressions across releases.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
education.institution: University Of North Carolina At Charlotte

certifications: AWS Academy Graduate - AWS Academy Data Engineering
